<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-iū]][[de:Metall-Hahn]][[hak:Sîn-yû]][[ja:辛酉]][[ko:신유]][[vi:Tân Dậu]][[za:Sinyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-iú]][[zh-yue:辛酉]][[zh:辛酉]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-iū]][[de:Metall-Hahn]][[hak:Sîn-yû]][[ja:辛酉]][[ko:신유]][[vi:Tân Dậu]][[za:Sinyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-iú]][[zh-yue:辛酉]][[zh:辛酉]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-iū]][[de:Metall-Hahn]][[hak:Sîn-yû]][[ja:辛酉]][[ko:신유]][[vi:Tân Dậu]][[za:Sinyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-iú]][[zh-yue:辛酉]][[zh:辛酉]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rooster|kanji=辛酉|romaji=kanoto tori|onyomi=shinyū|p=xīyǒu|w=hsin-yu|mi=ɕin⁵³ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=san1 jau5|j=san1 jau5|ci=sɐn jɐu|mc=sin jɨu|oc-bs=sin jɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Rooster also known as  Yin Metal Rooster''' ({{ill|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Metal Rooster|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=}}) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 58th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|zh|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|ko|경신|fr|Singe de métal|de|Metall-Affe|en|lt_ko=경신|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, and followed by {{ill|Yang Water Dog|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|zh|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|ko|임술|fr|Chien de eau|de|Wasser-Hund|en|lt_ko=임술|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|cdo|Gŭi (tiĕng-găng)|fr|Gui (tige céleste)|gan|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|ko|계 (천간)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|zh|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|WD=Q822621|lt=Rooster (雞)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}} also represents yin metal, forming a {{ill|harmonious relationship|ja|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/harmonious relationship|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/harmonious relationship|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Rooster (辛酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: shinyuu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinyu (신유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Dậu

<!--
==
* Yin Metal Rooster (辛酉) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 jau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: かのととり (kanoto-tori)
***Onyomi: しんかのとり (shinka-no-tori)
***Onyomi: しんゆう (shinyū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinyu
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Dậu

-->
==Years of Yin Metal Rooster==
{{Anchors|Xinyou Year|qq=}}
A {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year that leaves a remainder of 1 when divided by 60 is a '''Yin Metal Rooster year'''.

Yin Metal Rooster is considered to have revolutionary significance.

In the ancient Chinese texts known as {{ill|Wei Shu|ja|緯書|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wei Shu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wei Shu|1=weishu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24890026}} (banned by Emperor {{ill|Emperor Yang of Sui|en|Emperor Yang of Sui|WD=Q7419|lt=Yang of Sui|1=Emperor Yang of Sui}}), with surviving fragments found in {{ill|Miyoshi Kiyotsura|en|Miyoshi Kiyotsura|WD=Q2399435|lt=Miyoshi Kiyoyuki|1=Miyoshi Kiyotsura}}’s “{{ill|Kakumei Kanbun|ja|革命勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|1=kakumei kanmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11663819}}” (collected in ''{{ill|Gunsho Ruijū|en|Gunsho Ruijū|WD=Q1554852|lt=Gunsho Ruijū|1=Gunsho Ruijū}}'' vol. 26), it is written that following {{ill|Kōshin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, Yin Metal Rooster also embodies the metal element, and Xin represents yin energy, often associated with people becoming cold-hearted. Thus, a Yin Metal Rooster year is considered a year when the {{ill|Mandate of Heaven|en|Mandate of Heaven|WD=Q875377|lt=Mandate of Heaven|1=Mandate of Heaven}} changes, marking revolutionary shifts in {{ill|Dynasty|en|Dynasty|WD=Q164950|lt=dynasties|1=Dynasty}}, known as the '''{{ill|Xinyou Revolution|ja|辛酉革命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou Revolution|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou Revolution|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 辛酉|1=Yin Metal Rooster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q904743}}'''.

In Japan, era name changes ({{ill|Era name|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era name|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era name|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}) during Yin Metal Rooster years were meant to prevent political upheaval. This practice started in Yin Metal Rooster of {{ill|901|en|901|WD=Q23580|lt=901|1=901}} ({{ill|Shōtai|en|Shōtai|WD=Q1324780|lt=Shōtai|1=Shōtai}} 4), when scholar-official Miyoshi Kiyoyuki proposed changing the era name to '''{{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|WD=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}}'''. Frequently, era names were changed consecutively in both {{ill|Kōshin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and Yin Metal Rooster years, a custom that continued until the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}}, though such a precedent does not exist in China.

{{Anchors|Xinyou Revolution|qq=}}
During the Meiji era, scholar {{ill|Naka Michiyo|ja|那珂通世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Michiyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Michiyo|1=Naka Michiyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642793}} referenced ''Kakumei Kanbun'' with {{ill|Zheng Xuan|en|Zheng Xuan|WD=Q197649|lt=Zheng Xuan|1=Zheng Xuan}}’s annotation: 
* “The way of Heaven is not distant; after every three and five, it returns. Six cycles ({{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}) form one era, four sixes and two sixes overlap, and three sevens multiply to form 21 cycles, totaling 1,320 years.”
Based on this, it was believed that every '''1,260 years''' (21 cycles × 60 years = 1,260, called ''Ichibu'') there would be a major revolution during a Yin Metal Rooster year. Applying this, Naka theorized that the 9th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|WD=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}}’s reign ({{ill|601|en|601|WD=Q30597|lt=601|1=601}}) marked such a revolutionary year, suggesting that Emperor {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}’s enthronement occurred 1,260 years earlier, in {{ill|660 BC|en|660 BC|WD=Q1059526|lt=660 BC|1=660 BC}}.

Alternatively, some interpret the annotation as indicating a '''1,320-year cycle''' (60 × 22 = 1,320). In this case, the pivotal year would shift to the year of the {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}, three years after Yin Metal Rooster, considered the '''Jiazi Reform Year''' ({{ill|Jiazi Reform|ja|甲子革令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiazi Reform|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiazi Reform|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 甲子|1=Yang Wood Rat|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1190890}}). This places the starting point at {{ill|664|en|664|WD=Q30621|lt=664|1=664}} AD, the year after the {{ill|Battle of Baekgang|en|Battle of Baekgang|WD=Q608727|lt=Battle of Baekgang|1=Battle of Baekgang}}, aligning with the legendary founding date of 660 BC.

==Months of Yin Metal Rooster==
A '''Yin Metal Rooster month''' occurs in {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August|1=August}} of years ending in 3 or 8 (corresponding to Heavenly Stems {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} and {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}). Depending on the calendar system, this could refer to the {{ill|lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} month or the solar term period between {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}} and the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew|1=Hanlu}}.

A '''Yin Metal Rooster day''' is the 7th day in the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} sequence, excluding intercalary days.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Metal Rooster Years'''
|-
!{{ill|1st millennium BC|en|1st millennium BC|WD=Q25716|lt=1st millennium BC|1=1st millennium BC}}!!{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium AD|1=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium AD|1=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium AD|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
*{{ill|960 BC|ja|紀元前960年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/960 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/960 BC|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 紀元前10世紀|1=10th century BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q25425}}
*{{ill|900 BC|ja|紀元前900年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/900 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/900 BC|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 紀元前9世紀|1=9th century BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q25424}}
*{{ill|840 BC|ja|紀元前840年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/840 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/840 BC|1=840 BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1450311}}
*{{ill|780 BC|ja|紀元前780年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/780 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/780 BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=780 BC|WD=Q1059191}}
*{{ill|720 BC|ja|紀元前720年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/720 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/720 BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=720 BC|WD=Q1057404}}
*{{ill|660 BC|en|660 BC|WD=Q1059526|lt=660 BC|1=660 BC}}
*{{ill|600 BC|en|600 BC|WD=Q246827|lt=600 BC|1=600 BC}}
*{{ill|540 BC|en|540 BC|WD=Q243305|lt=540 BC|1=540 BC}}
*{{ill|480 BC|en|480 BC|WD=Q43241|lt=480 BC|1=480 BC}}
*{{ill|420 BC|en|420 BC|WD=Q233151|lt=420 BC|1=420 BC}}
*{{ill|360 BC|en|360 BC|WD=Q75637|lt=360 BC|1=360 BC}}
*{{ill|300 BC|en|300 BC|WD=Q47353|lt=300 BC|1=300 BC}}
*{{ill|240 BC|en|240 BC|WD=Q35557|lt=240 BC|1=240 BC}}
*{{ill|180 BC|en|180 BC|WD=Q45891|lt=180 BC|1=180 BC}}
*{{ill|120 BC|en|120 BC|WD=Q44114|lt=120 BC|1=120 BC}}
*{{ill|60 BC|en|60 BC|WD=Q41527|lt=60 BC|1=60 BC}}
|
*{{ill|1|en|1|WD=Q199|lt=1|1=1}}
*{{ill|AD 61|en|AD 61|WD=Q23862|lt=61|1=AD 61}}
*{{ill|AD 121|en|AD 121|WD=Q30939|lt=121|1=AD 121}}
*{{ill|181|en|181|WD=Q31368|lt=181|1=181}}
*{{ill|241|en|241|WD=Q32065|lt=241|1=241}}
*{{ill|301|en|301|WD=Q24654|lt=301|1=301}}
*{{ill|361|en|361|WD=Q47953|lt=361|1=361}}
*{{ill|421|en|421|WD=Q33562|lt=421|1=421}}
*{{ill|481|en|481|WD=Q30284|lt=481|1=481}}
*{{ill|541|en|541|WD=Q30870|lt=541|1=541}}
*{{ill|601|en|601|WD=Q30597|lt=601|1=601}}
*{{ill|661|en|661|WD=Q30084|lt=661|1=661}}
*{{ill|721|en|721|WD=Q23541|lt=721|1=721}}
*{{ill|781|en|781|WD=Q31175|lt=781|1=781}}
*{{ill|841|en|841|WD=Q24870|lt=841|1=841}}
*{{ill|901|en|901|WD=Q23580|lt=901|1=901}}
*{{ill|961|en|961|WD=Q23881|lt=961|1=961}}
|
*{{ill|1021|en|1021|WD=Q19257|lt=1021|1=1021}}
*{{ill|1081|en|1081|WD=Q19450|lt=1081|1=1081}}
*{{ill|1141|en|1141|WD=Q19613|lt=1141|1=1141}}
*{{ill|1201|en|1201|WD=Q5225|lt=1201|1=1201}}
*{{ill|1261|en|1261|WD=Q5509|lt=1261|1=1261}}
*{{ill|1321|en|1321|WD=Q5769|lt=1321|1=1321}}
*{{ill|1381|en|1381|WD=Q6331|lt=1381|1=1381}}
*{{ill|1441|en|1441|WD=Q6402|lt=1441|1=1441}}
*{{ill|1501|en|1501|WD=Q6131|lt=1501|1=1501}}
*{{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}}
*{{ill|1621|en|1621|WD=Q6812|lt=1621|1=1621}}
*{{ill|1681|en|1681|WD=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}}
*{{ill|1741|en|1741|WD=Q7573|lt=1741|1=1741}}
*{{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}}
*{{ill|1861|en|1861|WD=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}}
*{{ill|1921|en|1921|WD=Q2162|lt=1921|1=1921}}
*{{ill|1981|en|1981|WD=Q2437|lt=1981|1=1981}}
|
*{{ill|2041|en|2041|WD=Q49914|lt=2041|1=2041}}
*{{ill|2101|en|2101|WD=Q11036264|lt=2101|1=2101}}
*[[:en:2161|2161]]
*{{ill|2221|en|2221|WD=Q28913545|lt=2221|1=2221}}
*[[:en:2281|2281]]
*[[:en:2341|2341]]
*{{ill|2401|en|2401|WD=Q27207302|lt=2401|1=2401}}
*[[:en:2461|2461]]
*{{ill|2521|ja|2521年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2521|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2521|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2581|ja|2581年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2581|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2581|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2641|ja|2641年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2641|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2641|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2701|en|2701|WD=Q97236494|lt=2701|1=2701}}
*{{ill|2761|ja|2761年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2761|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2761|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2821|ja|2821年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2821|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2821|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2881|ja|2881年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2881|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2881|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*[[:en:2941|2941]]
|}

==Days of Yin Metal Rooster==
* {{Cite book|language=ja |title={{ill|Kakumei Kanbun|ja|革命勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|1=kakumei kanmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11663819}}: Written by {{ill|Miyoshi no Sukune Kiyoyuki|ja|三善宿禰清行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyoshi no Sukune Kiyoyuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyoshi no Sukune Kiyoyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |publisher={{ill|Keizai Zasshisha|ja|経済雑誌社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keizai Zasshisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keizai Zasshisha|1=Keizai Zasshisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11606486}} |pages=906–911 |series={{ill|Gunsho Ruijū|en|Gunsho Ruijū|WD=Q1554852|lt=Gunsho Ruijū|1=Gunsho Ruijū}}, Vol. 17 |editor={{ill|Hanawa Hokiichi|en|Hanawa Hokiichi|WD=Q6537362|lt=Hanawa Hokiichi|1=Hanawa Hokiichi}} |url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/1879818/1/458|qq=}}

==See Also==
* {{ill|Kakumei Kanbun|ja|革命勘文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|1=kakumei kanmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11663819}}
* {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}
* {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}
* {{ill|Tsukamoto Meiki|ja|塚本明毅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamoto Meiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamoto Meiki|1=Akitake Tsukamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3607355}}’s ''{{ill|Sansei Sōran|ja|三正綜覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sansei Sōran|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sansei Sōran|1=Q11356063|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356063}}''

==External Links==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20110410225801/http://www004.upp.so-net.ne.jp/dassai1/kakumeikannbunn/gen.htm ''Kakumei Kanbun'' from ''Gunsho Ruijū'', Vol. 26]

[[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]]
[[zh-yue:乙未]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Rooster|qq=ja|辛酉|version=103101214|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Ziegenevi]]
[[de:Yin Metal Rooster]]

[[ja:辛酉]]
[[zh:辛酉]]
[[ko:신유]]
[[fr:Coq de métal]]
[[de:Metall-Hahn]]

[[af:Houtbok (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Ziegeneen]]
[[en:Wood Goat]]
[[fr:Chèvre de boisboishak]]
[[it:Yit-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:을미]]
[[vi:Ất Mùi]]
[[za:Yitceij]]
[[zh:乙未]]
[[ar:Yin Metal Rooster]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalhaan (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Sĭng-iū]]
[[hak:Sîn-yû]]
[[vi:Tân Dậu]]
[[za:Sinyoux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-iú]]
[[zh-yue:辛酉]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalhaan (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Sĭng-iū]]
[[hak:Sîn-yû]]
[[vi:Tân Dậu]]
[[za:Sinyoux]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-iú]]
[[zh-yue:辛酉]]
{{wikidata link|Q904743}}
[[Category:Chinese astrology]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
